overview: A personal yoga website for Akshat (Yogakshatam), featuring a calm and minimal design with soft earthy tones. Includes all key sections: hero, about, classes, schedule, pricing, testimonials, gallery, and contact.
features: Hero section with serene background and call-to-action
Classes catalog with Hatha, Vinyasa, Restorative, and Meditation
Weekly schedule view with color-coded classes
Calm earthy color palette with generous whitespace
